productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Men Porsche Design CL Navy Blue Casual Shoes
description: A perfect fusion of design and style from two brand majors - the classic Porsche and adidas - brings to you the Porsche Design CL from adidas originals. Cleverly combining the unique design languages of these two Brands, this contemporary looking shoe model is signed off with a Porsche Design logo.UpperLeather upper with adidas patented 3-Stripes on the sides of the midfoot and Porsche branding on the lateral side Lacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded collar and tongue with a textile inner lining for comfort and optimum fitMildly padded footbed for all-day comfortHard back heel to lock the foot in placeMidsoleMoulded midsole detailing for vintage style and impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole with horizontal grooves on the medial forefoot and lateral heel, and curved grooves on the lateral forefoot for absolute durability, grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
